self_check.notes: Bounding box was expanded to fit footprint (11x9x9). All operation coordinates have been kept within bbox [xmin..xmax]=[0..11],[ymin..ymax]=[0..9],[zmin..zmax]=[0..9]. Operation count is 19 (within 260). Plan includes explicit floor (two layers), walls, roof, windows, and an entrance door. Materials roles separated: stonebrick foundation/trim, planks walls/floor, logs corner posts, glass_pane windows, nether_bricks roof, stone_slab trim. Roof stepped to approximate curved profile. Caveat: some high-level ops (build_roof_sequence, place_columns, place_windows) are compound for clarity but refer to concrete coordinates inside bbox.
